# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects before making outbound requests.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Validator;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    /**
     * Allowed destination schemes.
     */
    private const ALLOWED_SCHEMES = ['http', 'https'];

    /**
     * Maximum number of redirects to follow.
     */
    private const MAX_REDIRECTS = 3;

    /**
     * Request timeout in seconds.
     */
    private const TIMEOUT = 10;

    /**
     * Fetch and display a website preview.
     */
    public function preview(Request $request)
    {
        $validator = Validator::make($request->all(), [
            'url' => 'required|url|max:2048',
        ]);

        if ($validator->fails()) {
            return response()->json([
                'error' => 'Invalid URL provided.',
                'details' => $validator->errors(),
            ], 422);
        }

        $url = $request->input('url');

        // Validate the URL scheme
        $parsedUrl = parse_url($url);
        if (!$parsedUrl || !isset($parsedUrl['scheme']) || !isset($parsedUrl['host'])) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Malformed URL.'], 422);
        }

        if (!in_array(strtolower($parsedUrl['scheme']), self::ALLOWED_SCHEMES, true)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Only HTTP and HTTPS URLs are allowed.'], 422);
        }

        // Validate the host is not a private/internal IP or reserved hostname
        $validationResult = $this->validateHost($parsedUrl['host']);
        if ($validationResult !== true) {
            return response()->json(['error' => $validationResult], 403);
        }

        // Validate optional port
        if (isset($parsedUrl['port']) && !in_array($parsedUrl['port'], [80, 443], true)) {
            return response()->json(['error' => 'Only ports 80 and 443 are allowed.'], 403);
        }

        // Fetch the URL content with controlled redirect handling
        $result = $this->fetchUrl($url);

        if (isset($result['error'])) {
            return response()->json(['error' => $result['error']], 400);
        }

        // Parse the HTML to extract preview data
        $previewData = $this->extractPreviewData($result['body'], $url);

        return response()->json([
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $previewData,
        ]);
    }

    /**
     * Validate that a host does not resolve to a private/internal IP address.
     */
    private function validateHost(string $host): bool|string
    {
        // Block obviously internal hostnames
        $blockedHostnames = [
            'localhost',
            'localhost.localdomain',
            '0.0.0.0',
            'metadata.google.internal',
            'instance-data',
        ];

        $lowerHost = strtolower($host);
        if (in_array($lowerHost, $blockedHostnames, true)) {
            return 'Access to internal hosts is not allowed.';
        }

        // Block .local, .internal, .localhost TLDs
        $blockedTlds = ['.local', '.internal', '.localhost', '.localdomain'];
        foreach ($blockedTlds as $tld) {
            if (str_ends_with($lowerHost, $tld)) {
                return 'Access to internal hosts is not allowed.';
            }
        }

        // Resolve the hostname to IP addresses and validate each one
        $ips = gethostbynamel($host);
        if ($ips === false) {
            return 'Could not resolve hostname.';
        }

        foreach ($ips as $ip) {
            if ($this->isPrivateOrReservedIp($ip)) {
                return 'Access to private or reserved IP addresses is not allowed.';
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Check if an IP address is private, reserved, or otherwise internal.
     */
    private function isPrivateOrReservedIp(string $ip): bool
    {
        // Use PHP's built-in filter to check for private and reserved ranges
        if (filter_var($ip, FILTER_VALIDATE_IP, FILTER_FLAG_NO_PRIV_RANGE | FILTER_FLAG_NO_RES_RANGE) === false) {
            return true;
        }

        // Additional explicit checks for cloud metadata IPs
        $blockedCidrs = [
            '169.254.0.0/16',   // Link-local / cloud metadata
            '100.64.0.0/10',    // Carrier-grade NAT
            'fc00::/7',         // IPv6 unique local
            'fe80::/10',        // IPv6 link-local
            '::1/128',          // IPv6 loopback
        ];

        foreach ($blockedCidrs as $cidr) {
            if ($this->ipInCidr($ip, $cidr)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    /**
     * Check if an IP address falls within a CIDR range.
     */
    private function ipInCidr(string $ip, string $cidr): bool
    {
        [$subnet, $bits] = explode('/', $cidr);

        $ipBin = inet_pton($ip);
        $subnetBin = inet_pton($subnet);

        if ($ipBin === false || $subnetBin === false) {
            return false;
        }

        // Ensure same address family
        if (strlen($ipBin) !== strlen($subnetBin)) {
            return false;
        }

        $bits = (int) $bits;
        $fullBytes = intdiv($bits, 8);
        $remainingBits = $bits % 8;

        // Compare full bytes
        for ($i = 0; $i < $fullBytes; $i++) {
            if ($ipBin[$i] !== $subnetBin[$i]) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        // Compare remaining bits
        if ($remainingBits > 0 && $fullBytes < strlen($ipBin)) {
            $mask = 0xFF << (8 - $remainingBits) & 0xFF;
            if ((ord($ipBin[$fullBytes]) & $mask) !== (ord($subnetBin[$fullBytes]) & $mask)) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Fetch URL content using cURL with manual redirect handling.
     */
    private function fetchUrl(string $url): array
    {
        $currentUrl = $url;
        $redirectCount = 0;

        while ($redirectCount <= self::MAX_REDIRECTS) {
            $ch = curl_init();

            curl_setopt_array($ch, [
                CURLOPT_URL => $currentUrl,
                CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
                CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => false, // Handle redirects manually
                CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => self::TIMEOUT,
                CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 5,
                CURLOPT_MAXFILESIZE => 5 * 1024 * 1024, // 5MB max
                CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'LinkPreviewBot/1.0',
                CURLOPT_HEADER => true,
                CURLOPT_NOBODY => false,
                CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
                CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
                CURLOPT_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
                CURLOPT_REDIR_PROTOCOLS => CURLPROTO_HTTP | CURLPROTO_HTTPS,
                // Prevent cURL from resolving to private IPs at the connection level
                CURLOPT_IPRESOLVE => CURL_IPRESOLVE_V4,
            ]);

            $response = curl_exec($ch);
            $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
            $headerSize = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HEADER_SIZE);
            $effectiveUrl = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_EFFECTIVE_URL);
            $primaryIp = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_PRIMARY_IP);

            if (curl_errno($ch)) {
                $error = curl_error($ch);
                curl_close($ch);
                return ['error' => 'Failed to fetch URL: ' . $error];
            }

            curl_close($ch);

            // Verify the resolved IP is not private/reserved (defense in depth)
            if (!empty($primaryIp) && $this->isPrivateOrReservedIp($primaryIp)) {
                return ['error' => 'Access to private or reserved IP addresses is not allowed.'];
            }

            // Handle redirects
            if (in_array($httpCode, [301, 302, 303, 307, 308], true)) {
                $redirectCount++;

                if ($redirectCount > self::MAX_REDIRECTS) {
                    return ['error' => 'Too many redirects.'];
                }

                // Extract Location header
                $headers = substr($response, 0, $headerSize);
                $redirectUrl = $this->extractLocationHeader($headers);

                if (!$redirectUrl) {
                    return ['error' => 'Redirect without Location header.'];
                }

                // Resolve relative URLs
                if (!preg_match('#^https?://#i', $redirectUrl)) {
                    $redirectUrl = $this->resolveRelativeUrl($currentUrl, $redirectUrl);
                }

                // Validate the redirect destination
                $parsedRedirect = parse_url($redirectUrl);
                if (!$parsedRedirect || !isset($parsedRedirect['scheme']) || !isset($parsedRedirect['host'])) {
                    return ['error' => 'Invalid redirect URL.'];
                }

                if (!in_array(strtolower($parsedRedirect['scheme']), self::ALLOWED_SCHEMES, true)) {
                    return ['error' => 'Redirect to disallowed scheme.'];
                }

                if (isset($parsedRedirect['port']) && !in_array($parsedRedirect['port'], [80, 443], true)) {
                    return ['error' => 'Redirect to disallowed port.'];
                }

                $hostValidation = $this->validateHost($parsedRedirect['host']);
                if ($hostValidation !== true) {
                    return ['error' => 'Redirect blocked: ' . $hostValidation];
                }

                $currentUrl = $redirectUrl;
                continue;
            }

            if ($httpCode !== 200) {
                return ['error' => 'Received HTTP status code: ' . $httpCode];
            }

            $body = substr($response, $headerSize);
            return ['body' => $body, 'url' => $effectiveUrl];
        }

        return ['error' => 'Too many redirects.'];
    }

    /**
     * Extract the Location header from raw headers.
     */
    private function extractLocationHeader(string $headers): ?string
    {
        if (preg_match('/^Location:\s*(.+)$/mi', $headers, $matches)) {
            return trim($matches[1]);
        }
        return null;
    }

    /**
     * Resolve a relative URL against a base URL.
     */
    private function resolveRelativeUrl(string $baseUrl, string $relativeUrl): string
    {
        $parsed = parse_url($baseUrl);
        $scheme = $parsed['scheme'] ?? 'https';
        $host = $parsed['host'] ?? '';
        $port = isset($parsed['port']) ? ':' . $parsed['port'] : '';

        if (str_starts_with($relativeUrl, '//')) {
            return $scheme . ':' . $relativeUrl;
        }

        if (str_starts_with($relativeUrl, '/')) {
            return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $relativeUrl;
        }

        $basePath = $parsed['path'] ?? '/';
        $basePath = substr($basePath, 0, strrpos($basePath, '/') + 1);

        return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $basePath . $relativeUrl;
    }

    /**
     * Extract preview data (title, description, image, etc.) from HTML content.
     */
    private function extractPreviewData(string $html, string $url): array
    {
        $data = [
            'url' => $url,
            'title' => null,
            'description' => null,
            'image' => null,
            'site_name' => null,
        ];

        // Suppress HTML parsing errors
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);

        $doc = new \DOMDocument();
        $doc->loadHTML('<?xml encoding="UTF-8">' . mb_substr($html, 0, 500000), LIBXML_NOWARNING | LIBXML_NOERROR);

        libxml_clear_errors();

        $xpath = new \DOMXPath($doc);

        // Extract Open Graph tags
        $ogTags = [
            'og:title' => 'title',
            'og:description' => 'description',
            'og:image' => 'image',
            'og:site_name' => 'site_name',
        ];

        foreach ($ogTags as $property => $key) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@property='{$property}']/@content");
            if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
                $data[$key] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Fallback to Twitter Card tags
        $twitterTags = [
            'twitter:title' => 'title',
            'twitter:description' => 'description',
            'twitter:image' => 'image',
        ];

        foreach ($twitterTags as $name => $key) {
            if (empty($data[$key])) {
                $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='{$name}']/@content");
                if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
                    $data[$key] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
                }
            }
        }

        // Fallback to standard meta description
        if (empty($data['description'])) {
            $nodes = $xpath->query("//meta[@name='description']/@content");
            if ($nodes && $nodes->length > 0) {
                $data['description'] = trim($nodes->item(0)->nodeValue);
            }
        }

        // Fallback to <title> tag
        if (empty($data['title'])) {
            $titleNodes = $xpath->query('//title');
            if ($titleNodes && $titleNodes->length > 0) {
                $data['title'] = trim($titleNodes->item(0)->textContent);
            }
        }

        // Sanitize output
        foreach ($data as $key => $value) {
            if (is_string($value)) {
                $data[$key] = htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
            }
        }

        return $data;
    }
}
